name: C-15 freshness gate exits one with never-fetched stale signal when no marker exists
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id soc2-tsc --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'never fetched' err.txt && echo never 1>&2
